title: thymus ciliatus var. major
intro: Thymus ciliatus var. major, also known as the Italian thyme, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Thymus ciliatus var. major include its ability to relieve coughs, sore throats, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe respiratory issues, calm the mind, and promote overall well-being.
